prompt: Replace the dropdown list for DL State with a list of car brands.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. In the open dropdown menu labeled 'DL State' on the right side of the image, replace the current list of US states with a list of car brands. Preserve the existing visual style and layout of the dropdown menu, including its scrollbar and item selection highlight.
objects: CrimeStar State Interface Client application window
Left panel with green text content
Right form panel with user input fields (e.g., Last Name, First Name, DOB)
List of car brands (e.g., Toyota, Honda, Ford) within the dropdown menu
Item selection highlight within the dropdown menu (applied to a car brand)
